title: undermine
description: mod that adds three new endings with a plot
body:
_**mod for new endings**_

[there is a mod here too](https://authors.curseforge.com/#/projects/1239969/license) *** 1-make a rocket get to the maquis maquis and make a time machine 2- get to heaven get to the temple and find the dragon 3- make quests . here are the worlds . ![1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bb7849ae9ce2527c3971561276f150381ab2339a.png) ![2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a7d03ccf0850faf6f6488e115cd67862cccc877c.png) ![3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d69a0e742b0e74b7f6f68dc1b88bf227c668298c.png) ![4](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7328388e74e1cb50346be5f44f7044adb1d980ff.png) ![5](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bb31c96f545599706f4e25af082ac9293b5336ee.png) Plot world there were two countries. In one of them, where the book was created, people were against killing dragons. In the other country, where dragons were honored, they were ruthlessly exterminated. But we found the last dragon and protected it. We made the end uncomfortable so no one could find it. And when we did, a meteorite hit the earth, bringing with it a zombie disease. The people from the second country flew to the Maquis, and we stayed on earth to solve the problem. We invented a cure for the disease, and now we successfully treat everyone who needs help.  Hi, so far we've only just arrived on this dwarf planet, and so far we have almost nothing, but it's getting better and better every day We're still researching the virus, but we already know that it's spread through scales. When they get on the rock, they contract the disease but show no signs. They become expendable for the disease, just like the zombies, the scales we brought with us in large numbers. We've made the planet habitable, but there's a problem with the plants.We ended up on the planet Maki-Maki because of a zombie virus that spread on Earth. We have made this planet habitable and discovered that a time machine can be built here. We have all the necessary knowledge and technology to realize this project. However, there is a problem: many meteorites fall on the planet, containing the substance needed for the time machine to work. This has already destroyed more than half of our buildings. And now, another meteorite has fallen, and there zom...this book is 200 years old If a zombie virus hits this planet, it will be gone in 100 years, but all those infected will not be cured. ![1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f61c477b5ca8be1a22ad52e3a21108f205533b15.png)
